\tzpentry{ID5746}{Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5746 introduces Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}(C_1,C_2) = \frac{1}{4\pi}\oint_{C_1}\oint_{C_2} \frac{d\mathbf{r}_1 \times d\mathbf{r}_2 \cdot (\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2)}{|\mathbf{r}_1-\mathbf{r}_2|^3} \in \mathbb{Z} \end{equation}
